summary: PRC Rate Consistency Bug Fix Verification - ALL 12 TESTS PASSED. Verified that all 5 rate functions now delegate to single source of truth (utils/helpers.py get_prc_rate). Key fix: bank_redeem.py was defaulting to 100 instead of 10 - now fixed. All endpoints return consistent rate of 11.
critical_code_review_comments: bank_redeem.py line 67-70: get_dynamic_prc_rate() now delegates to helpers.get_prc_rate_sync()
manual_bank_transfer.py line 63-66: get_dynamic_prc_rate() now delegates to helpers.get_prc_rate(db)
growth_economy.py line 94-97: get_dynamic_prc_rate() now delegates to helpers.get_prc_rate(db)
prc_economy.py line 25-28: get_dynamic_prc_rate_economy() now delegates to helpers.get_prc_rate(database)
server.py line 5217-5223: get_dynamic_prc_rate() marked DEPRECATED, delegates to helpers.get_prc_rate(db)
context_for_next_testing_agent: PRC rate consistency bug has been fixed and verified. All 5 rate functions (bank_redeem.py, manual_bank_transfer.py, growth_economy.py, prc_economy.py, server.py) now delegate to single source of truth in utils/helpers.py. Default rate is 10 (not 100). Current calculated rate is 11. Key endpoints verified: /api/bank-transfer/config, /api/prc-economy/current-rate, /api/growth/economy-settings, /api/growth/prc-rate, /api/bank-redeem/denominations, /api/bank-transfer/calculate-fees, /api/growth/calculate-redeem.

single_source_of_truth.description: All rate functions delegate to utils/helpers.py get_prc_rate()

no_100_default.description: No rate function defaults to 100 (was the bug in bank_redeem.py)

rate_consistency.description: All endpoints return the SAME PRC rate value

api_test_results.bank_redeem_denominations: PASS - GET /api/bank-redeem/denominations returns prc_rate: 11 in samples

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: Users seeing different PRC rates in production
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: 5 different rate functions reading from different DB collections with different fallback chains. bank_redeem.py defaulted to 100 instead of 10
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Created single source of truth get_prc_rate() in utils/helpers.py, replaced all 5 duplicate functions
bug_fix_verification.verification_status: CONFIRMED FIXED - All 12 tests pass, all endpoints return consistent rate of 11
